{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153648353FEECC9EE8247C3F97"}"},"total":831},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542587071197659966","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我靠。这特么的到底是啥啊[恐惧][恐惧][恐惧]反转不断，看得人头皮发麻，惊险刺激，高燃热血，高能悬疑，地下革命党人的斗争，肃然起敬。。。好看呐太TM的好看了。。。我靠我靠我靠我靠我靠。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756158262,"group_id":"7424406236667333657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+SdC1U1DQx9935DuJY6uYI=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"571356742945844","user_name":"古山的草叶猴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"571356742945844","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424406236667333657","book_info":{"abstract":"隐蔽战线1奉天推演：
他是一名年轻的老司机，一名被人遗忘的底层卧底，在血腥的惨淡人生中，他跨越了半个世纪和大半个中国。
他的身体比常人有更多的弱点，焦虑、心慌、恐高、恐血、胆小。
作为间谍，这些致命点足足可以让他死一百次一千次，但他却活着。
他的代号也没有那么响亮或云谲波诡，而后来却成为令对手闻风丧胆的名字。
谨以此文献给为了中华民族自由独立事业默默牺牲奉献的千千万万个特殊战线上的无名英雄。
隐蔽战线2外滩妙算：
八一三后，抗日战争进入白热化，白色恐怖弥漫整个上海。
地下党员叶云生打入日寇竹机关，这里汇聚的都是精挑细选的精英，这里不仅是异常凶险的魔窟，还是深不可测的深渊，这里敌情的凶险要比当初的奉天警察总署特调处凶险十倍!
尤其是叶云生右臂废掉，日本人也怀疑他是间谍，布下陷阱让他自投罗网……
隐蔽战线3金陵诡谲：
815光复后，国民党为了挑起内战对革命根据地进攻疯狂进攻掠夺胜利果实，国民党招收大量汉奸为其所用，我党打入日本竹机关特高课的职员叶云生也在策反之列，由于叶云生的能力被中统和军统同时欣赏，叶云生接受组织命令同时打入中统和军统，成为“三栖”特工，但中统机关不比竹机关，叶云生日本文化的优势荡然无存，由于前汉奸身份遭到同事鄙视，处处受压，尤其是受到顶头上司孔某的打击报复，叶云生步步维艰如履薄冰……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/352a8114b52df769025d07243484ce01~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"金飙","author_id":"","book_id":"7424406236667333657","book_name":"隐蔽战线（全三册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70.1万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":973,"name":"战争军旅","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=973&name=战争军旅&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7424713140413139993","read_count":"11632","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"564790"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"309","tags":"精品小说,战争军旅","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/352a8114b52df769025d07243484ce01~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435408&x-signature=HlFzr%2BCXGe3G6shByD3PheIC75U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"327"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153648353FEECC9EE8247C3F97"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33814,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":774},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7486695354295272216","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书作为谍战小说，构思巧妙，是部烧脑剧。内容波澜壮阔，从东北写到南京，从九一八事变写到解放。虽然部分情节在合理性上值得商榷，但的确是部优秀的谍战推理小说。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743136682,"group_id":"7424406236667333657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6OEAXvfaCkSQNCjrktir3w=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"53084834664","user_name":"随心飞扬8318"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53084834664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424406236667333657","book_info":{"abstract":"隐蔽战线1奉天推演：
